culturalMoments.name: Era as Identity Marker
culturalMoments.description: The cultural normalization of personal 'eras' as chapter markers. People talk about 'entering a new era', 'leaving my old era behind', 'this is my ___ era'.

culturalMoments.name: Creator as Profession
culturalMoments.description: Being a 'creator' has shifted from describing a hobby to describing a career. LinkedIn profiles now list 'Content Creator' as a job title.
culturalMoments.languageShift: 'Creator' is now professional identity, not a side hustle description.

culturalMoments.name: Founder Mode
culturalMoments.description: The 2024 cultural emergence of 'founder mode' — ambitious professionals who think like founders even inside larger organizations.

culturalMoments.name: Anti-Hustle Balance
culturalMoments.description: The pendulum has swung toward intentional work and lifestyle design. 'Hard work' is less aspirational; 'smart work from anywhere' is more resonant.
